code:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from typing import List, Dict

# Define tags metadata for OpenAPI
tags_metadata: List[Dict[str, str]] = [
    {
        "name": "items",
        "description": "Operations with items. Manage your inventory.",
    },
    {
        "name": "users",
        "description": "Manage users in the system.",
        "externalDocs": {
            "description": "Users external docs",
            "url": "https://example.com/users-docs/",
        },
    },
]

# Initialize FastAPI app with custom OpenAPI documentation parameters
app = FastAPI(
    title="My Custom Inventory API",
    description="This is a very fancy inventory API with custom OpenAPI documentation. "
                "It allows you to manage items and users efficiently.",
    version="2.0.0",
    terms_of_service="http://example.com/terms/",
    contact={
        "name": "API Support Team",
        "url": "http://x-force.example.com/contact/",
        "email": "contact@example.com",
    },
    license_info={
        "name": "Apache 2.0",
        "url": "https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html",
    },
    openapi_tags=tags_metadata,
    openapi_url="/api/v1/openapi.json",  # Custom URL for OpenAPI schema
    docs_url="/documentation",            # Custom URL for Swagger UI
    redoc_url="/redocs"                   # Custom URL for ReDoc
)

# Example endpoint for items
@app.get("/items/", tags=["items"])
async def read_items():
    """
    Retrieve all items available in the inventory.
    """
    return [{"item_id": "Foo", "name": "Foo Item"}, {"item_id": "Bar", "name": "Bar Item"}]

# Example endpoint for users
@app.get("/users/{user_id}", tags=["users"])
async def read_user(user_id: int):
    """
    Retrieve details of a specific user.
    """
    return {"user_id": user_id, "username": f"user_{user_id}"}

# You can access the customized documentation at:
# - Swagger UI: http://127.0.0.1:8000/documentation
# - ReDoc: http://127.0.0.1:8000/redocs
# - OpenAPI JSON Schema: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/openapi.json

# To run this application:
# 1. Save it as a Python file (e.g., main.py).
# 2. Install uvicorn: pip install "uvicorn[standard]"
# 3. Run from your terminal: uvicorn main:app --reload
prompt: FastAPI ile automatic OpenAPI documentation özelleştir.
